backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor implementing user profiles, chart analysis storage, and settings management with role-based access control (admin/user permissions) and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs to their affected files, related components, test IDs, and confidence levels for ProcessingScreen redesign and animation changes.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document providing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and key details of each component and page.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining light and dark mode CSS custom properties (design tokens) for colors, borders, charts, and sidebar used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Advance Signal Pro' that mounts the React app via a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (dashboard, analyze, processing, results, history, settings) wrapped in ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/CameraCapture.ts: Camera capture component using a useCamera hook with Portuguese UI labels, supporting start/stop/capture/retake/switch-camera actions and localized error messages for permission, not-found, and unsupported scenarios.
frontend/src/components/ChartOverlay.tsx: Canvas-based overlay component that draws dashed support/resistance level lines and directional trend arrows on top of a chart image loaded from sessionStorage.
frontend/src/components/FileUpload.tsx: A drag-and-drop file upload component that supports file selection, drag-over, and paste-from-clipboard, with a 10MB size limit and visual feedback for selected files.
A clickable card component that displays a single analysis history entry with signal direction, confidence percentage, and timestamp, navigating to the results page on click.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a min-height screen container, renders child routes via Outlet, a toast notifier, and a footer with attribution.
Displays a single processing step with an animated progress bar, spinner, and checkmark, tracking elapsed time to show eased progress while active or complete.
frontend/src/components/SettingRow.tsx: A simple layout component that renders a labeled setting row with a description on the left and an arbitrary control element on the right.
frontend/src/components/SignalCard.tsx: Displays the main trading signal card showing direction (buy/sell/sideways/no-entry), confidence percentage, trend badge, and optional strength indicator with color-coded styling.
frontend/src/config/apiConfig.ts: Empty configuration file, likely a placeholder for API configuration settings.
frontend/src/context/ThemeContext.tsx: Provides a React context for light/dark theme management, persisting the selected theme to localStorage and applying it as a class on the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity or actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipboard.ts: A hook that listens for paste events on the window and extracts image files from the clipboard, exposing the captured image and any permission error.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including analyses, user settings, and daily operation progress/limits.
frontend/src/hooks/useSettings.ts: Thin wrapper around useGetSettings and useUpdateSettings query hooks, exposing a unified settings object with loading and updating state.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet using Tailwind with CSS custom properties for light/dark theming, plus custom styles for a processing bar animation, range inputs, and touch targets.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyzeChart.tsx: Page component for selecting or capturing a chart image via file upload, camera, or clipboard, then storing it in sessionStorage before navigating to the processing page.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying the app branding, AI status badge, and navigation buttons to analyze charts, view history, and access settings.
frontend/src/pages/History.tsx: Page that fetches and lists past chart analyses using useGetAnalyses, showing a loading state or an empty-state prompt if no analyses exist.
frontend/src/pages/ProcessingScreen.tsx: Displays a multi-stage processing animation while analyzing a chart image from sessionStorage using local candle analysis, then stores the result and optionally persists it via the backend actor before navigating to the results page.
frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx: Renders the chart analysis results page, displaying trend direction, signal, candlestick patterns, probabilities, and a chart overlay thumbnail loaded from sessionStorage.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page allowing users to configure AI sensitivity, default timeframe, daily operation limit, signal notifications, and light/dark theme, persisting changes via backend mutations.
frontend/src/services/localCandleAnalysi: Client-side candle chart analysis engine that uses Canvas pixel data to detect red/green candle patterns, trend direction, and generate a trading signal without any HTTP requests.
frontend/src/types/analysisTypes.ts: Defines the TypeScript interface for the local candle analysis result, including signal type, trend, confidence, probabilities, patterns, strength, and optional error fields.
frontend/src/types/apiTypes.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for external API chart analysis responses and errors, with detailed JSDoc describing the expected 6-step rule-based analysis process the API must implement.
frontend/src/utils/dataUrlToFile.ts: Utility function that converts a base64 data URL string into a File object, returning null on any invalid input or error without throwing.
frontend/src/utils/formatTimestamp.ts: Utility function that converts a nanosecond bigint timestamp to a human-readable Portuguese date-time string.
frontend/src/utils/mapApiResponse.ts: Maps a local candle engine analysis result (LocalAnalysisResult) to the internal AnalysisResult format, converting signals, trends, and candlestick patterns to their corresponding enum values and handling chart detection errors.
frontend/src/utils/shareAnalysis.ts: Provides a shareAnalysis utility that formats an analysis result into a Portuguese text summary and shares it via the Web Share API or copies it to the clipboard as a fallback.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that sets up dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended spacing/shadow/border-radius values, accordion keyframe animations, and registers the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 45) describing Advance Signal Pro as a mobile financial chart analysis app with local candle analysis, Portuguese UI, and tracking existing features, architectural notes, and known issues.
